body.thing: the inference boundary persists EVERY byte (full request + raw response) to the training corpus on every dispatch
body.intention: Every dispatch must write a corpus record carrying BOTH the upstream request-message bytes AND the downstream raw-response bytes; metadata-only logging loses the training signal

red_run.summary:
^

body.why: training needs the complete I/O, not cost metadata; a dispatch that captures no bytes is the silent gap this rule closes
